$comment: Layer C for GRADE vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image. Two branches: WS-SCORE >= 60 (input boundary, solved 59/60/61) and the 88-level PASSING expanded to WS-PASS-FLAG = 1 (a derived flag, constant 0 or 1 on each score branch, so the impossible flag/score combinations are proven infeasible). The bonus is a source*constant ROUNDED form solved by congruence on the passing path.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 GRADE (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-grade)
